phrases.en: After dinner, Pam took the jigsaw puzzle down from the shelf.
phrases.zh: 晚饭过后，帕姆从架子上把拼图取了下来。

phrases.en: She cleared the coffee table and wiped it clean.
phrases.zh: 她清空了茶几，并把它擦干净了。

phrases.en: She lifted the lid and tipped all the pieces out onto the table.
phrases.zh: 她掀开盒盖，把所有的拼图块都倒在了桌子上。

phrases.en: She turned every piece face up so she could see the colors.
phrases.zh: 她把每一块都翻成正面朝上，这样就能看清上面的颜色。

phrases.en: She propped the box up and studied the picture on the front.
phrases.zh: 她把盒子立了起来，仔细端详盒子正面的图案。

phrases.en: First, she sorted out all the flat edge pieces.
phrases.zh: 她先把所有带平边的拼图块都挑了出来。

phrases.en: She carefully built the border around the outside.
phrases.zh: 她小心地拼出了外围的边框。

phrases.en: Next, she grouped the rest by color into small piles.
phrases.zh: 接着，她把剩下的拼图块按颜色分成了一小堆一小堆。

phrases.en: She slowly filled in the bright blue sky at the top.
phrases.zh: 她慢慢地拼好了顶部那片明亮的蓝天。

phrases.en: She pressed each piece down gently until it snapped into place.
phrases.zh: 她轻轻按下每一块，直到它咔哒一声卡进了位置。

phrases.en: When one tricky piece would not fit, she patiently tried another.
phrases.zh: 有一块特别难拼，怎么也放不进去，她就耐心地换了另一块来试。

phrases.en: At last she pressed in the final piece and admired the finished picture.
phrases.zh: 最后，她按上了最后一块，欣赏着拼好的完整图画。
